project: Sauce Demo Shopify - Playwright Automation Framework

phases.title: Project Scaffolding & Configuration
phases.description: Set up the base project structure, install dependencies, and configure environment variables.

tasks.title: Initialize Playwright TypeScript project
tasks.description: Run `npm init playwright@latest`, select TypeScript, configure playwright.config.ts with baseURL from environment, set up chromium/firefox/webkit browsers, enable screenshot and video on failure.
acceptance_criteria: playwright.config.ts reads baseURL from process.env.BASE_URL
Config supports multiple browsers
Screenshots and videos captured on test failure

tasks.title: Create folder structure
tasks.description: Create the full project directory layout following POM and data-driven conventions.
acceptance_criteria: All folders exist and are committed
Each folder has a descriptive README or index file

tasks.title: Create environment config file
tasks.description: Create config/env.config.ts that exports BASE_URL, credentials, timeouts, and any other env-specific values. Values should fall back to .env or process.env.
acceptance_criteria: BASE_URL is never hardcoded in tests or page objects
.env.example documents all required variables
Real .env is in .gitignore

tasks.title: Add .gitignore file
tasks.description: Create a comprehensive .gitignore for a Node.js/TypeScript Playwright project.

phases.title: Page Object Model Implementation
phases.description: Build POM classes for every page/component of the Sauce Demo Shopify site.

tasks.title: Create BasePage class
tasks.description: Create pages/BasePage.ts with shared methods: navigate(), waitForPageLoad(), getTitle(), takeScreenshot(). All other pages extend this.
acceptance_criteria: BasePage accepts Playwright Page object in constructor
All page classes extend BasePage

tasks.title: Create HomePage page object
tasks.description: Map the Sauce Demo Shopify home page. Include: hero banner, navigation menu, featured products, search bar interactions.
acceptance_criteria: All interactive elements are mapped as locators
No hardcoded selectors outside the page class

tasks.title: Create ProductListingPage page object
tasks.description: Map the product collection/listing page. Include: product cards, filters, sort options, pagination, add-to-cart from listing.

tasks.title: Create ProductDetailPage page object
tasks.description: Map the individual product detail page. Include: product title, price, variant selectors, quantity input, add-to-cart button, product images.

tasks.title: Create CartPage page object
tasks.description: Map the shopping cart page/drawer. Include: cart items list, quantity update, item removal, subtotal, proceed to checkout button.

tasks.title: Create CheckoutPage page object
tasks.description: Map the Shopify checkout flow. Include: contact info, shipping address, shipping method selection, payment fields, order summary, place order button.

tasks.title: Create NavigationComponent page object
tasks.description: Map the shared site navigation/header. Include: logo, main nav links, cart icon + item count, search icon, account link.

phases.title: Test Data Setup
phases.description: Create JSON data files for all test scenarios and a utility to load them.

tasks.title: Create test data JSON files
tasks.description: Create JSON files for each domain of test data.

tasks.title: Create data loader utility
tasks.description: Create utils/dataLoader.ts with a generic function to read and parse any JSON file from the data/ folder. Should be strongly typed with TypeScript generics.
acceptance_criteria: Function is generic: loadData<T>(filename: string): T
Throws descriptive error if file not found

phases.title: Test Implementation
phases.description: Write high-priority test specs using the POM classes and JSON data.

phases.title: Reporting Setup
phases.description: Configure Playwright HTML reporter and Allure reporter.

tasks.title: Configure Playwright HTML reporter
tasks.description: Enable the built-in Playwright HTML reporter in playwright.config.ts. Set output folder to playwright-report/. Add npm script: `test:report`.
acceptance_criteria: HTML report generated after test run
`npm run test:report` opens the report

tasks.title: Configure Allure reporter
tasks.description: Install allure-playwright and allure-commandline. Configure in playwright.config.ts. Add npm scripts for generate and open. Add @epic, @feature, @story annotations in test files.
acceptance_criteria: Allure results generated in allure-results/
`npm run allure:generate` and `npm run allure:open` work
Tests have Allure labels/annotations

phases.title: CI/CD - GitHub Actions
phases.description: Add GitHub workflow for PR checks and main branch runs with Slack notification.

tasks.title: Create GitHub Actions workflow for PRs
tasks.description: Create .github/workflows/playwright-pr.yml. Trigger on pull_request to any branch. Steps: checkout, setup Node, install deps, run Playwright tests, upload HTML report as artifact.
acceptance_criteria: Workflow runs on every PR
Test results uploaded as GitHub artifact
Workflow fails PR if tests fail

tasks.title: Create GitHub Actions workflow for main branch with Slack notification
tasks.description: Create .github/workflows/playwright-main.yml. Trigger on push to main. Same test steps as PR workflow plus: post Slack notification on completion using slackapi/slack-github-action. Message should include pass/fail status, run URL, and branch name. SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL stored as GitHub secret.
acceptance_criteria: Slack message sent after every main branch run
Message contains: status (pass/fail), GitHub run URL, branch
SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL is a GitHub Actions secret, never hardcoded

phases.title: Documentation
phases.description: Write clear README and supporting documentation.

tasks.title: Write README.md
tasks.description: Create a comprehensive README.md covering: project overview, tech stack, folder structure diagram, prerequisites, installation steps, how to run tests (all browsers, single file, headed mode), how to view reports (HTML + Allure), environment variable setup, GitHub Actions setup, Slack webhook setup.
